mapper.select:
SELECT ug.grade_id AS gradeId, e.id AS exam_id, e.title AS exam_title, g.grade_name, MAX(ues.user_score) AS max_score, MIN(ues.user_score) AS min_score, AVG(ues.user_score) AS avg_score, COUNT(ues.user_id) AS attendNum FROM t_exam e JOIN t_exam_grade ug ON e.id = ug.exam_id JOIN t_user_exams_score ues ON e.id = ues.exam_id and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1,1) JOIN t_user u ON ues.user_id = u.id AND u.grade_id = ug.grade_id JOIN t_grade g ON ug.grade_id = g.id
e.is_deleted = 0 and ues.user_id IS NOT NULL
and ug.grade_id = #{gradeId}
and e.title like concat('%',#{examTitle},'%')
and g.id in
#{uId}
GROUP BY ug.grade_id, e.id, e.title

select ues.id,u.id as userId ,e.title, u.real_name, ues.user_time, ues.user_score, ues.limit_time, ues.count,e.id as examId from t_user_exams_score as ues join t_user as u on ues.user_id = u.id join t_exam as e on ues.exam_id = e.id
u.grade_id = #{gradeId} and ues.exam_id = #{examId} and ues.state = 1 and ues.whether_mark in (-1, 1)
and u.real_name like concat('%',#{realName},'%')

SELECT u.real_name AS realName, ues.user_score AS userScore, IFNULL(ues.count, 0) AS cutScreenCount FROM t_user_exams_score ues JOIN t_user u ON ues.user_id = u.id WHERE ues.exam_id = #{examId} AND u.grade_id = #{gradeId} AND ues.state = 1 AND ues.whether_mark IN (-1, 1) AND ues.user_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ues.user_score DESC

SELECT ues.exam_id AS examId, e.title AS examTitle, e.gross_score AS grossScore, ues.user_score AS userScore, ues.limit_time AS limitTime FROM t_user_exams_score ues JOIN t_exam e ON ues.exam_id = e.id AND e.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ues.user_id = #{userId} AND ues.state = 1 AND ues.whether_mark IN (-1, 1) ORDER BY ues.limit_time ASC

SELECT ues.exam_id AS examId, ues.user_id AS userId, ues.user_score AS userScore FROM t_user_exams_score ues JOIN t_user u ON ues.user_id = u.id WHERE u.grade_id = #{gradeId} AND ues.whether_mark IN (-1, 1) AND ues.state = 1 AND ues.exam_id IN
#{eid}

select u.id as userId, u.real_name as userName, e.title as examTitle, ues.limit_time, ues.exam_id, case ues.whether_mark when 1 then '是' when 0 then '否' end as corrected from t_user_exams_score as ues left join t_user as u on ues.user_id = u.id left join t_exam as e on ues.exam_id = e.id where ues.exam_id = #{examId} and ues.whether_mark = 0 and ues.state = 1
and u.real_name like concat('%',#{realName},'%')
